subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which Mughal Emperor did not visit Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान मुगल समय में कौन-सा मुगल शासनकालीन अम्बर केलेंद्र के राजधानी में नहीं आयं।
explanation_en: Sikandar Lodi was never the ruler of Rajasthan. He was the ruler of Delhi during the Mughal Empire.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the founder of Mewar?
explanation_en: Chhatra Singh is known for founding the Mewar kingdom in 1493 AD. Meanwhile, Pratap Singh and Ran Singh are also known for their contributions.
